title: New Website and Interactive map for a Crestwood Behavioral Health
summary: Crestwood needed a way to visualize their locations across the state. We gave them a solution.
problem: A state-wide behavioral health organization needed a way to visualize their locations across the state. The existing website didn't provide an intuitive way for users to find and interact with this information.
approach: We rebuilt the site with a focus on location visualization. Every page was evaluated by asking: does this help users find and understand the organization's mission? If not, it was rewritten, simplified, or removed.

We wrote new headline copy and narrative for each program level — language that described the actual experience of being a student there, not the institutional language the school used internally. We worked directly with department heads and current families to get the voice right.
We built a custom interactive map that allowed users to easily find and explore the organization's locations across the state, with clear information about the services offered at each location.
result: The new site launched to positive feedback from both internal stakeholders and external users. The interactive map became a key feature, helping users easily find and understand the organization's locations and services.
